CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2007 Continued To Aug-24-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: P. VanSteenberge.
H. Nelson Meeks, Esq. for Plaintiff: Marina Lepe, present with Spanish Interpreter: Jazmin Solorzano.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, matter is submitted and taken under submission.
Counsel to prepare a Proposed Judgment for review.

July 30, 2007
The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Los Hermanos Auto Plaza, Enrique Romero, Suzuki of Sacramento, and Luxury Imports of Sacramento, Inc. as follows:
Total Damages $100,000.00
Each Defendants is responsible for $25,000.00 for damages.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
